type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility reached the reporting threshold for the amount of Methanol used in 2013 (> 10 tonnes),
however, the amount of Methanol released on site is negligible, and below detection limits. Any Methanol
released at site would be released and consumed at the flare.
